upload.title: Upload & Share
upload.description: Upload your study materials and share knowledge with others.

reward.title: Earn & Grow
reward.description: Earn reputation, badges and climb the leaderboard.

security.title: Secure & Private
security.description: Your data is safe with us. We value your privacy and security.

forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address to receive an OTP code.
forgotPassword.heroDescription: No worries. Enter your email address and we will send you an OTP code to verify your account before creating a new password.
forgotPassword.checkEmailDescription: We will send a secure OTP code to your registered email.
forgotPassword.verifyIdentityDescription: OTP verification helps protect your AI Study Hub account.
forgotPassword.createPasswordDescription: After verification, you can safely reset your password.

resetPassword.description: Create a new secure password for your account.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.description: Enter the OTP code sent to your email.

hero.title: Learn Smarter with
hero.description: Upload, discover and learn from thousands of study materials. Get AI-powered help anytime, anywhere.

storage.title: Smart Document Storage
storage.description: Securely store and organize your notes, textbooks, and papers in a searchable cloud environment.

ai.title: AI Study Assistant
ai.description: Chat with your docs. Get instant answers, summaries, and personalized explanations for any concept.

community.title: Community Knowledge Hub
community.description: Join a global community of learners. Share resources, collaborate, and access verified study materials.

rewards.title: Reputation & Rewards
rewards.description: Earn points for contributing. Level up from Student to Elite Scholar and unlock exclusive premium features.

topRated.title: Top-Rated Documents
topRated.description: Discover and learn from the highest-rated study materials in our community.

teaser.title: Interact with your Documents Like Never Before
teaser.description: AI only answers based on the documents you choose. Our assistant is specifically trained on your uploaded materials to provide high-accuracy academic support.
teaser.bullet1: Summarize Document into key bullet points.
teaser.bullet3: Explain Concept in simple, easy-to-understand terms.

chat.greeting: Hello! I've indexed your "Java OOP.pdf" and others. How can I help you today?

settings.label: Settings
settings.title: Application Settings
settings.description: Manage your language, appearance, academic configurations, and application experience.

language.title: Display Language
language.description: Choose the display language for AI Study Hub.

academic.title: Default Semester
academic.description: Filter study documents and curricula automatically based on your active semester.

appearance.themeDescription: Select your theme mode (Light, Dark) or automatically sync with your operating system.
appearance.colorDescription: Choose a primary accent color for application buttons, links, and highlighted details.

cache.title: Clear Local Cache
cache.description: Free up temporary workspace cache (does not delete account data or materials).
cache.resetDescription: Reset all display language, appearance themes, and default semesters back to factory defaults.
cache.resetSuccess: All interface configurations reset to defaults. Reloading app...
cache.resetConfirmPrompt: This action will restore all language, theme, and color settings back to system defaults. Are you sure you want to proceed?

dashboard.subtitle: Ready to discover and share knowledge today?

admin.appealMessage: Your account has been locked due to a violation of community guidelines. If you believe this is a mistake or wish to appeal this decision, you can submit an appeal directly to the Support Team.
admin.appealReasonPlaceholder: Enter detailed reason or evidence here...
admin.copiedAppeal: Appeal details copied to clipboard! You can paste directly into your email client (Gmail, Yahoo...).
admin.redirectingToGmail: Opening Gmail... Please review and send your appeal in the new tab.
admin.documentBannedMessage: This document has been temporarily hidden or locked due to a violation of our community guidelines. You can enter your appeal below to submit it to the administration team.
admin.refundSuccess: Appeal approved! Document restored and penalty points refunded.
admin.noPendingReports: Clean Inbox! No pending reports to review.
